meta.title: Chinese Repression and Uyghur Militancy at Eurasia's Crossroads
meta.description: Yang Jianli, Kilic Kanat, Sean Roberts and Eric Brown on the security and human rights situation in Xinjiang, the Uyghurs, and the PRC's New Silk Road
